title: rosa × andegavensis var. rotundifolia
intro: Rosa × andegavensis var. rotundifolia is a variety of alpine rose, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Rosa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × andegavensis var. rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and improving cardiovascular health. It is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments or as a natural remedy for skin and hair care.
